What Your Neighbors Have to Say

Read More Reviews →
M
Maria G.

Our old water heater finally gave out, and J. DeMiguel and Sons came to the rescue! They were quick, professional, and explained everything clearly. The new water heater works great, and the price was fair. Highly recommend!

D
David S.

Had a stubborn kitchen sink clog that I couldn't clear myself. J. DeMiguel and Sons arrived on time and cleared the drain quickly. The technician was friendly and professional. Would use again.

L
Lisa K.

Discovered a leak under my bathroom sink and called J. DeMiguel and Sons. They found the source of the leak quickly and repaired it efficiently. Very happy with their service and professionalism.

R
Robert B.

Our toilet was constantly running, wasting water. J. DeMiguel and Sons fixed the problem quickly and efficiently. The technician was knowledgeable and courteous. Great service!

J. DeMiguel And Sons Plumbing & Heating — Certified Professionals

Our team brings certified expertise and years of experience to every plumbing company project. We stand behind our work with comprehensive warranties and a commitment to quality.

More About Us →

The J. DeMiguel And Sons Plumbing & Heating Way

Our proven process ensures every project is completed with precision, transparency, and care.

1

Consultation

We start with a thorough, no-obligation assessment. Our certified team evaluates your needs and provides a detailed report with recommendations.

2

Plan & Prepare

We work with you to determine the best approach for your specific plumbing company needs. Our experts ensure the right plan for quality results.

3

Get It Done

Our skilled team gets to work with precision and efficiency. We maintain a clean, organized environment and keep you informed every step of the way.

4

Quality Check

Before we consider any job complete, our team performs a comprehensive quality review. We verify every detail meets our exacting standards.

5

Wrap Up

Transparent pricing with no surprises. You only pay when you're 100% satisfied with the work. We offer flexible options to make the process seamless.

Proudly Serving Phoenix & Beyond

As a locally owned and operated company, we're proud to serve customers throughout Phoenix, AZ and the surrounding communities. Our team brings local expertise and dedication to every project.

Scottsdale Mesa Chandler Gilbert Tempe Phoenix Paradise Valley Queen Creek
Let's Get Started →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our plumbing company services.

How can I tell if I have a hidden leak?

Signs of a hidden leak include unexplained increases in your water bill, damp spots on walls or ceilings, and the sound of running water when no fixtures are in use. Call us for a professional inspection.

What's the best way to repair a leaky pipe?

The best repair method depends on the location and severity of the leak. We offer various options, including pipe replacement, epoxy lining, and joint sealing.

How much does leak detection cost?

The cost of leak detection depends on the complexity of the job. We offer free estimates, so give us a call, and we'll provide a transparent quote.

Built on Phoenix Values

Get a free quote and experience the J. DeMiguel and Sons difference. Call us today!

Let's Begin →
